name: appi-claw
description: Automated job application assistant — applies to listings on Internshala, LinkedIn, Wellfound, and more.

tools.name: appi_claw_process
tools.description: Process a job listing through the full pipeline: parse → draft → approve → apply → log.

listing.description: Listing details: url (required), company, role, platform

tools.name: appi_claw_list
tools.description: Lists all pending and completed applications.
